waitlistSubtitle: Be the first to know when we launch new stuff. No spam, ever.
aboutContent: We thrive on turning boredom into brilliant, affordable digital products. Everyday problems need fun, beautiful, and accessible solutions. We're not bound by traditional agency rules. If it sounds fun, we build it. From idea to launch in record time, without compromising on quality. Not a creative agency, but a creation agency.
introDescription: For people who want things built fast, affordable, and fun.
heroSubtitle: Because we're bored. Supercharge your ideas with our creative engineering and playful design. We can help you build out your own bespoke systems.
comingSoonSubtitle: We're brewing some magic. Here is a sneak peek.
contactSubtitle: Whether you have a project in mind or just want to chat, drop us a line.
productsSubtitle: Things we built because we had a free weekend. Go ahead, give 'em a try.
